description:
A free and open source code snippets manager for developers


Fixes
- Fixed an issue on Windows where newly created Code snippets in local NTFS vaults could be mistaken for unavailable cloud files. This could show a cloud synchronization message, prevent edits from being saved, or display content from a previously selected snippet after switching. Local snippets now remain available during creation, renaming, and folder deletion, while genuinely unavailable cloud files remain protected.
